description: Part 1/10: Create the MQ5 file with header, properties, input parameters, constants, timeframe definitions, enumerations, and struct definitions (tracked_box, laol_line_data, last_valid_info, hcs_box_data, rr_box_set, seq_state). This is the foundation that all other parts build upon.
steps: Delete existing /projects/sandbox/Forex/STX_Edge.mq5 and create a new file
Add MQ5 header with #property indicator_chart_window, copyright, version

Add all input parameters matching Pine Script: InpSoftStart, InpTPMultiplier, InpSetupLookback, InpPipTarget, InpLaolDeleteDelay, InpShowFinalEntry, InpShowFinalS1S4, InpShowFinalIntraEst, InpShowFinalIntraEM, InpShowFinalIntraLV, InpShowFinalIntraNeg, InpFinalEntryMultiLaol, InpShowIntraEstRetest, InpShowIntraEMForming, InpShowIntraLVAligned, InpShowIntraNegation, InpShowHCSBoxes, InpShowSetupsS1S4
Define constants: TF_COUNT=25, ENTRY_MIN_IDX=0, ENTRY_MAX_IDX=4, SCALP_MIN_IDX=5, SCALP_MAX_IDX=15, INTRA_MIN_IDX=16, INTRA_MAX_IDX=24

Define TF_MINUTES array and GetTimeframe() function mapping minutes to ENUM_TIMEFRAMES (M7->M6, M8->M6, M9->M10, M11->M10, M13->M12, M14->M15, M35->M30, M40->M30, M45->H1, M50->H1, M55->H1, M90->H1, M100->H2)
Define ENUM_TF_CATEGORY enum and GetCategory()/GetCategoryStr() functions
Define struct SeqState with step, level, body, start_time fields

Define struct TrackedBox with ALL fields from Pine Script type tracked_box: direction, state, top_val, bottom_val, original_top, original_bottom, creation_time, protection_end_time, pattern_text, timeframe, obj_name (string for MT5 object name), has_est_retest, retest_type, protection_active, hcs_count, base_pattern, box_clr, border_clr, has_been_retested, is_intra, est_wick_high, est_wick_low, completed_est_retest, is_em_forming, just_established
Define struct LaolLineData with ALL fields: obj_name, label_name, level, tf_labels, creation_bar, is_bear, is_broken, break_bar, tf_count, has_entry, has_scalp, has_intra
Define struct LastValidInfo with pattern_text, original_text, level, est_time, direction, is_broken
Define struct HcsBoxData with obj_name, top_val, bottom_val, creation_bar, tf_label, direction, is_broken
Define struct RrBoxSet with sl_obj_name, tp_obj_name, pip_obj_name, direction, sl_level, creation_bar

Define color constants: entry_box_color (blue 95% transparent), entry_border_color (blue 50%), scalp_box_color (green 90%), scalp_border_color (green 50%), intra_box_color (red 95%), intra_border_color (red 50%), hcs_bear_bg (orange 80%), hcs_bear_border (orange 30%), hcs_bull_bg (#2196F3 80%), hcs_bull_border (#2196F3 30%), rr_sl_color (red 70%), rr_tp_color (green 70%)
Commit and push this part to GitHub with message 'feat: STX Edge MT5 Part 1/10 - Header, inputs, structs'
acceptance_criteria: File /projects/sandbox/Forex/STX_Edge.mq5 exists with valid MQL5 syntax for all struct definitions
All 18 input parameters are defined with correct types and defaults
All 6 struct types are properly defined with all fields matching Pine Script types
All color constants are defined with proper ARGB values for MT5
Code is committed and pushed to GitHub main branch
verification: Read the file and verify all structs have correct field definitions
Verify the file has proper MQL5 syntax (no Pine Script syntax remaining)
findings: File created with 288 lines. All 18 inputs, 6 structs, constants, TF_MINUTES array, GetTimeframe(), GetCategory(), GetCategoryStr(), ENUM_TF_CATEGORY enum, and 12 ARGB color constants are defined. ColorToARGB uses alpha parameter where 0=opaque and 255=fully transparent (so 95% transparency = alpha 12 which is 255*0.05). Pushed directly to main branch as instructed.
